description: Estimate theoretical/actual MA and required haul force.
placeholderLabel: Placeholder rule. Link this module to actual uploaded manual citations before operational use.
assumptions: Efficiency model is a planning approximation.
Pulley/rope condition and edge friction are not fully modeled.
warnings: Reality check: observed haul force may exceed estimate.
Confirm anchor, edge, and rope ratings before loading.
stepTemplates: Theoretical MA is {theoreticalMA}:1 for selected system.
Estimated actual MA is {actualMA}:1 using efficiency {efficiencyPerPulley}.
Estimated required haul force is {requiredHaulLbf} lbf.
Direction changes entered: {directionChanges}; validate friction impacts in field.

citationQueries.query: haul system setup and safety factors
